# Rule 34 App

Rule 34 App is an adult, mobile-first booru browser for discovering Rule 34 images, GIFs, and videos from multiple source sites.

## Site

- [Canonical site](https://r34.app/)
- [Primary post collection](https://r34.app/posts/safebooru.org)
- Tagged post collections use the `tags` query on post pages, for example [hair bun posts](https://r34.app/posts/safebooru.org?tags=hair_bun).
- [Sitemap](https://r34.app/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots policy](https://r34.app/robots.txt)

## Important Pages

- [Home](https://r34.app/)
- [Posts](https://r34.app/posts/safebooru.org)
- [Premium](https://r34.app/premium)
- [Privacy policy](https://r34.app/privacy-policy)
- [Terms of service](https://r34.app/terms-of-service)
- [DMCA](https://r34.app/dmca)

## Crawling Guidance

- This website contains adult content and should be handled as age-restricted material.
- Prefer canonical URLs on `https://r34.app`.
- For post collections, preserve meaningful `tags` query parameters when summarizing or citing a page.
- Do not treat source media files as hosted by Rule 34 App; media is loaded from third-party booru sources or image proxy infrastructure.
